objective: Implement the deterministic validator promised by receipts R068 through R070 so post-R064 slice receipts cannot claim required skill-lens or independent-reviewer coverage without supported member evidence.
deepModuleBoundary: A repo-owned validator script plus focused script tests only. This slice makes the already-reviewed goal/plan/state slice-assurance contract executable; it does not implement runtime packet ingestion, delivery-truth production paths, or historical PU backfill.
implementationThesis: The goal board now requires every post-R064 slice done claim to include improve-codebase-architecture, simplify, unslopify, he-code-review, testing, adversarial-reviewer, agent-native-reviewer, and best-practices-researcher coverage with supported member evidence. A deterministic validator should fail closed on missing members, unsupported pass claims, stale or unresolvable refs, reviewer artifact reuse, traversal/absolute refs, duplicate receipt IDs, and malformed result objects.
outOfScope: historical PU-001 through PU-016 backfill or ratification ledger
runtime-card, codex-runtime-evidence, delivery-truth, review-state, external-state, or pr-closeout behavior changes
GitHub, Linear, CI, or branch-protection mutation
absorbing unrelated dirty worktree changes into this slice
acceptanceCriteria: Validator accepts exactly one target receipt by ID and fails on duplicate receipt IDs.
Validator requires slice_skill_lens_results entries for improve-codebase-architecture, simplify, unslopify, he-code-review, and testing.
Validator requires independent_reviewer_results entries for adversarial-reviewer, agent-native-reviewer, and best-practices-researcher.

A pass member requires a structured object with status=pass, role matching the required member key, producer, receipt_id matching the target receipt, lifecycle_unit matching the target receipt lifecycle_unit, head_sha matching the target receipt head_sha, freshness=current, and a repo-relative resolvable evidence_ref to a non-empty file listed in changed_files.
The canonical freshness source for this validator is the structured member freshness field plus receipt-bound provenance fields; file mtime alone must never prove freshness.
Blocked, fail, and not applicable members require reason, owner, and accepted_exception_ref before a receipt can support a done claim; fail members cannot support done without the accepted exception.
Pass evidence refs cannot be reused across any required skill-lens or reviewer member unless a future accepted exception explicitly introduces member-scoped provenance semantics.

Absolute paths, lexical path aliases, path traversal, symlink-escaped refs, missing files, zero-byte files, stale freshness, stale receipt_id/lifecycle_unit/head_sha provenance, string-only result maps, and missing changed_files fail closed.
Focused tests cover positive and negative fixtures for the contract.
Goal/state/plan record the new validator command without claiming historical backfill completion.

reviewQuestions: Is this slice narrow enough to implement only the missing deterministic assurance validator?
Are the acceptance criteria sufficient to close the R068-R070 automation gap without pretending historical backfill is complete?
Are any evidence-ref or reviewer-artifact loopholes still missing from the validator contract?

stopConditions: Stop if reviewers identify a material acceptance gap before implementation.
Stop if existing dirty work overlaps a required validator file in a way that cannot be safely preserved.
Stop if script tests require broad repo validation changes outside this slice.
Stop if the validator would need to claim historical PU backfill rather than only checking a named receipt.
rollback: Remove the new validator script and focused test file if the contract is rejected.
Revert only this intent, receipt, goal/state/plan wording, and artifacts if validation proves the approach is unsound.
Do not roll back unrelated dirty worktree changes.
assumptions: Receipt R071 will be the first current receipt using the stricter structured slice_skill_lens_results and independent_reviewer_results member evidence shape.
Historical pre-R064 receipts remain evidence as written and require a separate backfill or accepted exception ledger before final goal closeout.
JSC-363 remains the tracker owner for this lifecycle.
